brief_justification: Wrong answer (desk instead of shelf) but reasoning about Fred's action is coherent; Surface-level analysis tracking only the last physical location of the book; No self-monitoring or questioning of the theory-of-mind aspect; No verification or sanity check against Maria's knowledge state; Presents answer as certain with no acknowledgment that Maria wasn't present when Fred moved the book; No consideration of Maria's perspective or the original shelf location; Shows one derivation step (Fred moved book to desk) but fails to trace Maria's epistemic state
